inline_comments.message:
I think now its time to move everything related to Delta feature to a separate controller , service etc.
We discussed it few months back regarding the refactoring we need to do to have a separate interface for the delta related features.
Its best that we do it now so that the existing CPS-Core related code is not directly changed coz of the delta feature.
Arpit knows abt the discussion and probably we have a ticket for that already.
not used and doesnt add any value as well.

i think we have to revisit this.
But for now we can create a separate ticket for it ( or a subtask ) to have that day0 subscrible to all dataspaces config.
We can do this at the last I guess.

i think i need a refresher on the xpath as query parameter here for the below operations ( GET , POST and DELETE )
lets discuss it in our meeting tomorrow.
These APIs are admin related APIs and not related to delta feature.
No Problems, It can be submitted in separate patch
I will demo and explain the usages of xpath
NB: NotificationSubscriptionsDataSample for consistency. As you chose it that way.

the service layer can as well return these.
We dont have to do it in the controller layer.
If we move this logic to service layer then u wont need to inject PrefixResolver and JsonObjectMapper here in controller layer.
Check if feasible.

check my comment on patchset 10.
this logic should be in the service layer instead of the controller layer.
which will in turn avoid injecting new dependencies.
if u look at the previous comment then this would be moved.

should be in org.onap.cps.impl
